sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114186" key="xlohfa/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χλοη-φάγος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114186.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">herbivorous,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ζῷα</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:238" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">238</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
